title: podman bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[5.6.0-2.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[5:5.6.0-2]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/56f1962)
- fixes 'Work on RHEL 9.7 packaging'
- Related: RHEL-80816

[5:5.6.1-0.1]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/d46b857)
- fixes 'Work on RHEL 9.7 packaging'
- Related: RHEL-80816

[5:5.6.0-1]
- update to https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v5.6.0
- Related: RHEL-80816

[5:5.5.2-1]
- update to https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v5.5.2
- Related: RHEL-80816

[5:5.5.1-1]
- update to https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v5.5.1
- Related: RHEL-80816
full_text:
[5.6.0-2.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[5:5.6.0-2]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
